content:
type: CLAIM
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: Adding case_sensitive parameter to groupby() filter (sync+async), defaulting to False using ignore_case postprocessor

fields.summary: Adding case_sensitive parameter to groupby() filter (sync+async), defaulting to False using ignore_case postprocessor

content:
type: ANSWER
files: src/jinja2/filters.py
summary: My case_sensitive kwarg is now the last param on sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (after default, before return type). Please add with_counts after case_sensitive in both signatures. Diff snippet: def sync_do_groupby(environment, value, attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False) -> ...; internally I added a 'key' attrgetter using postprocess=ignore_case for sorting/grouping when case_sensitive=False, then remap grouper to expr(values[0]) to preserve original case. Go ahead and layer with_counts on top of this in your own copy; I'm finalizing my patch now.
